name: ibx-precert
description: Independence Blue Cross (IBX, southeastern Pennsylvania / Philadelphia) commercial prior-authorization packet for a hospital-outpatient (POS 22) knee arthroscopy. The 'Independence Blue Cross' letterhead routes the bundle to the 'ibx' payer bucket (spec-v52 §4.5.17) and engages the IBX commercial overlay. The packet cites the applicable Medical Policy and attaches a clinical note (R-PA-IBX-001/002 pass), omits any submission-channel reference (R-PA-IBX-003 info), and -- as an outpatient surgery requested in a hospital-outpatient setting -- carries no site-of-care rationale for the higher-acuity site (R-PA-IBX-009 flag). Every other IBX rule self-gates off (no imaging, drug, DME, behavioral-health, transplant, appeal, or out-of-network trigger) and vacuously passes.

documents.name: ibx-pa-form.txt
documents.text:
Independence Blue Cross PPO Prior Authorization Request
Patient: Mary C Roe
DOB: 1968-11-22
Member ID: IBX123456789
Date of service: 2026-06-25
Place of service: 22
Requested procedure: knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy CPT 29881
Dx: M23.205 derangement of medial meniscus, left knee
Quantity: 1
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
Servicing facility NPI: 1306849393
TIN: 123456789
Medical necessity: persistent mechanical symptoms; see the applicable Independence Blue Cross Medical Policy.
Signature: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10

documents.name: ibx-note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: left knee pain with locking and catching.
History of present illness: four months of mechanical symptoms despite activity modification.
Physical exam: positive McMurray on the left; joint-line tenderness medially.
Assessment and plan: left medial meniscus tear; recommend arthroscopic partial meniscectomy.
Medical necessity: imaging confirms a displaced medial meniscus tear.
Note date: 2026-06-10
Signed: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10
